creator: jmd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 171921
svn diff in java/aparapi

Attached is a patch to remove i386 from the list of viable platforms for java/aparapi. The compilation causes OpenJDK8 on 10.1/i386 to dump core with an internal error.

Also, i386 does not (and most likely will not) support OpenCL, so this is not a big loss.
